ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark application */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmark */,
  "source_code_url" TEXT /* URL to the source code of the benchmark application */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the benchmark application is distributed */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Date and time of the last run of the benchmark */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the benchmark (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizations" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization */,
  "optimization_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of optimization (e.g., loop unrolling, vectorization) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the optimization (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the optimization */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark application */,
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Performance metric value (e.g., percentage improvement or slowdown) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each run of the benchmark */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was run */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware used for the run */,
  "software_environment" TEXT /* Details of the software environment (e.g., OS, compiler version) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., CPU time, memory usage) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_optimization_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimization_id") REFERENCES optimizations ("optimization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark application */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmark to which the tag applies */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware support entry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark application */,
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization */,
  "has_support" INTEGER /* Boolean value indicating if hardware support is available */,
  "estimated_slowdown" REAL /* Estimated slowdown without hardware support */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entry was last updated */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware used for the run */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the hardware (e.g., CPU model, RAM) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hardware support entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the hardware support entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_support_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_support_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_support_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_support_optimization_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimization_id") REFERENCES optimizations ("optimization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compiler engineer, performance analyst, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
